signals.title: Trump executive order directs NASA to plan quantum space applications
signals.summary:
The White House has issued an executive order aiming to unify and accelerate U.S. development of quantum technologies, including space systems that could enable next-generation navigation, sensing and secure communications. 
 The post  Trump executive order directs NASA to plan quantum space applications  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

The mission pairs Rocket Lab spacecraft with a True Anomaly vehicle in orbit to demonstrate rapid threat characterization and rendezvous operations

signals.title: Senate poised to advance housing bill to limit private equity purchases of single-family homes
signals.summary: Both chambers of Congress are expected to advance a sprawling housing package this week that's aimed at creating more supply and making homes more affordable.

signals.title: Childcare tax breaks can save families and businesses money — but few use them, congressional report finds
signals.summary: Childcare can be expensive for both parents and their employers. Yet existing tax incentives to help defray those costs may go unused, a new report finds.

signals.title: America is about to cede Africa’s space industry to China, and nobody’s talking about it.
signals.summary:
If the Trump administration is serious about executing its “America First in Africa” policy and transforming American engagement on the continent, it needs to focus on sectors where it still […] 
 The post  America is about to cede Africa’s space industry to China, and nobody’s talking about it.  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Tesla faces federal probe after Model 3 slams into Texas home, killing 76-year-old
signals.summary: Harris County authorities said that the driver, Michael Butler, said that he had been using Tesla's partially automated driving systems.

signals.title: Astrobotic says sale to Voyager will allow it to scale up
signals.summary:
Lunar lander developer Astrobotic decided to sell to Voyager Technologies so it could quickly scale up to meet the projected demands of NASA’s lunar base initiative. 
 The post  Astrobotic says sale to Voyager will allow it to scale up  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Budderfly and Viridi team up to install ‘fail-safe’ batteries at commercial facilities
signals.summary: Coupled with other efficiency measures offered through Budderfly’s energy-as-a-service solution, on-site batteries can reduce facilities’ energy expenses by up to 70%, Budderfly CEO Al Subbloie said.

signals.title: 6 takeaways from FERC’s data center interconnection decision
signals.summary: If RTOs fail to address large-load concerns identified by FERC, the agency will dictate the solutions, per FERC’s David LaCerte. “I say this not as a threat, but as a statement of duty,” he said.

signals.title: Chinese spaceplane releases object into orbit, according to commercial space surveillance
signals.summary:
China’s secretive spaceplane has released an object into orbit during its ongoing fourth mission, according to space surveillance firm LeoLabs. 
 The post  Chinese spaceplane releases object into orbit, according to commercial space surveillance  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: SpaceX stock tanks 16%, extending slump following post-IPO rally
signals.summary: A rally following the company's record breaking IPO on June 12 has cooled, with stock dropping the past three days of trading.

signals.title: Amazon Prime Day arrives earlier this year. Here's why Wall Street is watching closely
signals.summary: This year could see a major drive to everyday essentials, a growing category for the e-commerce giant's annual shopping event.

signals.title: Oil prices fall after U.S. authorizes Iranian crude sales
signals.summary: The discussions at the Swiss resort of Bürgenstock marked the first negotiations since Washington and Tehran signed a memorandum of understanding last week.

signals.title: [13F] Berkshire Hathaway (Buffett) — nuovo filing 2009-11-05
signals.summary: Controlla il filing per vedere le nuove posizioni aperte/aumentate.

signals.title: [13F] Pershing Square (Ackman) — nuovo filing 2024-07-29
signals.summary: Controlla il filing per vedere le nuove posizioni aperte/aumentate.

signals.title: [13F] Scion Asset Mgmt (Burry) — nuovo filing 2023-08-10
signals.summary: Controlla il filing per vedere le nuove posizioni aperte/aumentate.

signals.title: EVs are already on your grid. Visibility is the missing piece.
signals.summary: The flexible loads utilities need exist on your system, but you can't manage what you can't see.

signals.title: How AI fits in the energy development workflow
signals.summary: Energy's AI adoption is low. The developers pulling ahead know which workflows to automate.

signals.title: Rate cases are strategy: Redefining how utilities drive regulatory outcomes
signals.summary: Approaching the utility rate case with data, strategy and diligence enables favorable outcomes and strengthens credibility.

signals.title: China imposes trade curbs on dozens of U.S. firms in retaliation for Pentagon blacklist
signals.summary: The Pentagon earlier this month updated its so-called 1260H list by adding a slew of Chinese technology companies to a roster of entities it believes have aided Beijing's military.

signals.title: Astroscale raises funding to support growth strategy
signals.summary:
Satellite servicing company Astroscale is working to transition from technology demonstrations to a regular series of missions, bolstered by a recent capital infusion. 
 The post  Astroscale raises funding to support growth strategy  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: US Army tests autonomous boats during Philippine exercise
signals.summary: Autonomous boats helped escort a U.S. Army vessel during a military exercise, in a demonstration of how uncrewed assets are changing maritime operations.

signals.title: Kyiv’s drone leverage moved the US. Moscow could be next, a top Ukrainian official says.
signals.summary: After years of needing Western weapons, Kyiv is approaching negotiations with battlefield tech the U.S. now wants — and a possible ceasefire looming.

signals.title: US couldn’t repair battle-damaged ships in war with China, study finds
signals.summary: Battle-damaged U.S. warships could not be quickly repaired and returned to combat during a war with China, according to a new study by RAND.

signals.title: Can China’s latest air-to-air missile take on its US equivalent? Definitely maybe, experts say.
signals.summary: The PL-16’s specs would let it chase large, slower-moving aircraft, one analyst said, though its effectiveness against smaller, faster planes is unclear.

signals.title: Three key AI stocks to watch this week with traders expecting giant moves
signals.summary: Micron and Cerebras report this week. Also there's heavy options activity in Super Micro.

signals.title: Treasury Department authorizes Iranian oil sales through August
signals.summary: Iranian supertankers have switched on their transponders, after going dark during the war, as they depart the Persian Gulf loaded with oil.

signals.title: Companies are demanding states cut red tape. Data center-wary voters may think differently
signals.summary: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro touted a $20 billion economic development deal last June, the state's largest ever. It's caused Shapiro no shortage of grief.

signals.title: Meta's WhatsApp head to step down, will be replaced by Indian fintech founder Kunal Shah
signals.summary: Will Cathcart will step down as the head of WhatsApp and move into another role at the company. Kunal Shah will take over.

signals.title: Who is Andy Burnham? And 4 other things investors should know as the UK replaces its prime minister
signals.summary: Keir Starmer’s exit puts Andy Burnham, gilts, sterling and the next UK chancellor in focus for investors.

signals.title: 'Reward for failure': Investor support for Target Chair Brian Cornell falls to lowest level ever
signals.summary: Target Chair Brian Cornell built the retailer into a $100 billion-plus giant, but recent struggles and underperformance have fueled investor calls for change.

signals.title: Ukraine launches ‘TrophyLab’ platform to share captured Russian weapons with allies
signals.summary: Among the listed items available for study are, for example, a Kinzhal hypersonic missile and a T-90M tank.

signals.title: Alan Greenspan, former chairman of the Fed, dies at age 100
signals.summary: Alan Greenspan presided over the Federal Reserve for 19 years under four presidents and mastered the art of obfuscation known as Fedspeak.

signals.title: Vance hails 'great progress' in U.S.-Iran talks despite 'threatening' and 'whining'
signals.summary: JD Vance said U.S.-Iran talks in Switzerland made progress, with Tehran agreeing to allow IAEA inspectors back into Iran.

signals.title: CNBC Elite Advisors: Top ultra-high net worth wealth management firms for 2026
signals.summary: CNBC Elite Advisors recognizes wealth management firms serving high net worth and UHNW clients.

signals.title: Lucid to lay off roughly 18% of U.S. workforce, COO Marc Winterhoff leaves
signals.summary: Lucid Group is cutting its U.S. workforce by 18% as part of a cost-savings plan. It also said COO Marc Winterhoff is departing effective immediately.

signals.title: Shipping stalls in Strait of Hormuz after Iran declares key waterway closed again
signals.summary: The update comes even as industry trackers showed Iranian tankers have continued to sail through the strait.

signals.title: How to pick up some quick income using an auto stock hitting its stride
signals.summary: With broader macro uncertainties driving pocketed volatility across the automotive sector, patient options traders have an exceptional set-up to harvest high-quality premiums.

signals.title: UK PM Starmer resigns as Britain faces its seventh leader in 10 years
signals.summary: Keir Starmer said he will resign as U.K. prime minister and Labour leader, triggering a contest to choose his successor.

signals.title: UPS to invest $48 million in temperature-controlled facilities amid healthcare boom
signals.summary: UPS is announcing a new investment in healthcare logistics as demand for the temperature-controlled category booms, CNBC has learned exclusively.

signals.title: The new arms race in wealth management: Winning the ultra-wealthy
signals.summary: Most registered investment advisors say they serve wealthy clients. The CNBC Elite Advisors list aims to help ultra-high net worth investors narrow the field.

signals.title: Why a 66-year-old water treaty is becoming the latest India-Pakistan flashpoint
signals.summary: India and Pakistan are locked in a dispute over the Indus Water Treaty after New Delhi suspended the pact, raising concerns about regional stability.

signals.title: Raising the minimum wage has been a big political winner. Now it's running into resistance
signals.summary: Raising the minimum wage has been a progressive policy winner at the ballot box, but recent losses suggest an economic mood slowing its political momentum.
